input.command: which claude; echo "---"; ls -la $(which claude) 2>/dev/null; echo "---npm prefix---"; npm config get prefix 2>/dev/null; echo "---npm global writable?---"; ls -ld $(npm config get prefix 2>/dev/null)/lib/node_modules 2>/dev/null; echo "---node/npm versions---"; node --version 2>/dev/null; npm --version 2>/dev/null
input.description: Inspect claude binary and npm global setup

input.command: echo "=== which claude (PATH winner) ==="; which claude; echo; echo "=== all claude on PATH, in order ==="; which -a claude; echo; echo "=== ~/.local/bin/claude ==="; ls -la ~/.local/bin/claude 2>/dev/null; echo; echo "=== PATH order check: is ~/.local/bin before /usr/local/bin? ==="; echo "$PATH" | tr ':' '\n' | grep -nE '\.local/bin|/usr/local/bin'
input.description: Verify which claude binary takes precedence
Uninstall old npm global claude package
